page: Microsoft Azure DC8as_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCasv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture and features 8 dedicated vCPUs. The system is provisioned with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU. This instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This instance does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. It is, however, Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external storage volumes. There are no graphics processing units bundled with this configuration, and it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio position this instance as a stable resource for workloads requiring predictable compute performance without the overhead of specialized hardware. The lack of local storage and GPU resources makes it a streamlined option for architectures utilizing centralized databases or external storage. Appropriate workloads for this server type include general-purpose applications, web serving, mid-tier application servers, and development or testing environments.
description: Microsoft Azure DC8as_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine from the DCasv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, but it is Premium Storage capable, enabling high-performance external storage configurations. It also does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource profile, this server offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring steady, predictable performance. It is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, web serving, application hosting, and development environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC8as_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for general-purpose and web serving workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC8as_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine with 8 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 32 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core virtual machine with balanced memory allocation and premium external storage compatibility for general-purpose workloads.
